title: Wannschok
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Waste}}
[[File:EndlessWastesLavaRiver.jpg|thumb|250px|A River of Fire at dusk]]
The '''Wannschok''' was a hot, rocky desert on the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]]. It was home to the [[Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]], or "Red Nikto." The word ''Wannschok'', translated to [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic]], meant '''Endless Wastes'''. Another name for the region was the '''Fire-desert of Kinklath'''.

Once, the Wannschok was covered with beautiful vegetation. Eventually, however, the Endless Wastes were completely desertified and dried by the sun. Only dried wood from the old forests which once stood there were left, though a few plants adapted to the extreme heat. Within the dangerous and jagged mountains of the Endless Wastes were many large cave structures and freely flowing lava rivers (or [[River of Fire|Rivers of Fire]], as the natives called them).

Members of the [[Morgukai]] cult spent a month fasting in the desert.<!--As part of their training?--> The Morgukai warriors [[Bok]] and [[Tsyr]] faced off against the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] in the Endless Wastes in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]].
